overview.name: HTTP Headers
overview.description:
This scenario verifies HTTP request and response header handling.
Test flow includes: 1. Send POST request with custom request header. 2. Verify response status = 200. 3. Validate response body. 4. Validate that response contains mapped custom header.
This scenario validates: - Request header propagation - Response header validation - Header-based endpoint behavior

http.comment: Step 1-4. Send request with custom header and validate echoed response header
